---
title: "Projects"
description: |
  Some additional details about my projects
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{r , layout="l-body-outset"}
library(tidyverse)

units <- read_csv("data/teaching.csv")


x<- knitr::kable(units[1:5, ],
  booktabs = TRUE,
  caption = 'A table of the first 10 rows of the mtcars data.')
x

```


```{r}

```
